message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: lens flare overload — sun glare, washout, hexagonal flare artifacts, veiled hazy aesthetic

response.objective_caption: A field of tall grasses and wild plants stretches toward a low horizon at sunset, with scattered trees silhouetted along the distant tree line. Warm sunlight from the setting sun backlights the upper portions of the grasses, while the foreground vegetation falls into deep shadow. The sky above is partly cloudy with soft, scattered clouds catching the golden light. A low wooden structure is partially visible behind the field on the left side.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A field of tall grasses and wild plants stretches toward a low horizon at sunset, with scattered trees silhouetted along the distant tree line. Warm sunlight from the setting sun backlights the upper portions of the grasses, while the foreground vegetation falls into deep shadow. The sky above is partly cloudy with soft, scattered clouds catching the golden light. A low wooden structure is partially visible behind the field on the left side. A prominent red and white light leak streaks upward through the lower left quadrant, washing over the grasses and evoking analog film housing defects that lend the image a lo-fi, vintage authenticity.
